title: Eiga Youkai wocchi: Enma daiou to 5-tsu no monogataridanyan!
original_title: 映画 妖怪ウォッチ エンマ大王と5つの物語だニャン！
overview: When Keita frees Whisper, a ghost-like yōkai, from 190 years of imprisonment, Whisper pledges to protect Keita from supernatural dangers. Whisper also gives Keita a watch that allows Keita to see other yōkai. Together with the twin-tailed cat spirit Jibanyan, they encounter lots of yōkai-related problems and solve them.
